desc._value: During the event, experience the joy of success by using Joy Bird Feathers (sold by Inkwell) and Glittering Joy Bird Feathers (dropped by Joy Birds) to exchange your Lv. 45 Maple equipment for Lv. 70 Maple equipment with potential.
Hunt 8 Joy Birds anywhere in Maple World. Pay attention to your surroundings! They could appear at any time.
Get an Orange Mushroom Mount Coupon during the event period and you can learn to ride a mighty Orange Mushroom!

Gather 8 Potted Mini Maple Trees from monsters, minerals, or plants during the event period, and use your Item Pot (Y) to raise them for their magical fruit. You can raise your harvest count by using a Golden Maple Fruit in your inventory.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and help them with their dance practice for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and help them with their vocal training for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and help them with their instrument practice for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and cheer them on for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and help promote them for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
Join Cygnus, Lilin, or Valerie's fan club and help pretty them up for 8 days. They don't have to be consecutive days. Even if you change fan clubs, your records won't be erased.
A talented, yet lazy songstress, participating only at her Knights' request
A brilliant-eyed tomboy with a melodic voice and a mysterious past
She doesn't have the best voice, but this penguin wrangler has the drive to win
Complete the You've Got Talent! quest for the Maple Admin to improve your Rising Star's vocal skills.
Complete The Challenge of Orpheus! quest for Cassandra to improve your Rising Star's instrumental skills.
Complete the Shall We Dance? quest for Gaga to improve your Rising Star's dancing skills.
Complete the Celebrity Training quest for Cassandra to improve your Rising Star's beauty.
Complete the What Do Stars Live For? quest for Gaga to improve your Rising Star's fame.
Complete The Tabloids Strike! quest for Cassandra to improve your Rising Star's reputation.

0._value: $0$Every Sunday at 2PM and 5PM,$1$ the Rising Star trio will have a $2$special concert.$4$

1._value: $0$You can meet the future Rising Star trio $7$by going to Star Hall $5$$4$via the Dimensional Mirrors.$6$$3$

2._value: $0$You can see how your Rising Star is doing every Sunday.$3$$2$

desc._value: To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r3 days#k to earn #e#b200 Power Elixirs#k#n, which fully restore your HP and MP.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r4 days#k to earn a #e#bSecret Recipe#k#n item, which gratns you 3 recipes for the Professions you've learned.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r5 days#k to earn #e#b1 Golden Hammer#k#n, which increases a piece of equipment's available upgrades by 1. However, if a hammer fails, nothing will happen.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r6 days#k to earn #e#b1 Nightmare Mount 10-Day Coupon#k#n, which allows you to use the Nightmare Mount skill for 10 days.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r7 days#k to earn #e#b3 Advanced Equip Enhancement Scrolls#k#n, which further enhance fully upgraded items.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r8 days#k to earn #e#b3 Special Potential Scrolls#k#n, which grant hidden potential to items that don't have any.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r9 days#k to earn #e#b3 Golden Hammers#k#n, which increase a piece of equipment's available upgrades by 1. However, if a hammer fails, nothing will happen.

To meet the attendance requirements, charge up the Stone of Virtue's power gauge and #euse the Virtue's Blessing skill once a day#n.\r\nDo this for #r10 days#k to earn a pair of #b#eVirtue's Earrings#n#k, which requires Lv. 75 and has the following stats: #eUpgrades Available: 7, STR/DEX/INT/LUK +3, HP/MP +200\nMovement Speed/Jump +10,  Avoidability/Accuracy +200, all traits +40#n.
You charged up the Stone of Virtue for all 10 days! Unleash its awesome power and enjoy some unlimited hunting!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 1 Special Sundae to receive #e#b100x Sundaes#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 2 Special Sundaes to receive a #e#bWatermelon Popsicle#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 3 Special Sundaes to receive #e#b100x Power Elixirs#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 4 Special Sundaes to receive a #e#bMelon Popsicle#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 5 Special Sundaes to receive an #e#bAdvanced Equip Enhancement Scroll#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 6 Special Sundaes to receive a #e#bChocolate Popsicle#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 7 Special Sundaes to receive an #e#bIce Crystal Face Paint#k#n!

Collect these 3 ingredients once a day to whip up a delicious Special Sundae for the Secret Heat-Beating Recipe Book: #eSweet Syrup, Shredded Ice and Sliced Fruit.#n\r\n Make a total of 8 Special Sundaes to receive a #e#bStrawberry Popsicle#k#n!
You've completed all 8 Special Sundaes! Now you can enjoy the rest of your summer with the joy of ice cold refreshment.

Complete a map by collecting #e6 pieces of the pirate's Treasure Map#n once a day to record your progress in the Treasure Map Book.\rWhen you complete a #rTreasure Map for the first time#k, you can obtain #b20 Power Elixirs#k that will restore your HP and MP.

Complete a map by collecting #e6 pieces of the pirate's Treasure Map#n once a day to record your progress in the Treasure Map Book.\rWhen you complete a #rTreasure Map over 3 days#k, you can obtain #b3 Continent Transportation Scrolls#k and #b30 Power Elixirs#k that will restore your HP and MP.

Complete a map by collecting #e6 pieces of the pirate's Treasure Map#n once a day to record your progress in the Treasure Map Book. When you complete a #rTreasure Map over 5 days#k, you can obtain #b3 Scroll for Hand Cannon for ATT 65%#k, which has a 65% chance of giving your Hand Cannon ATT +2 and STR +1, and #b50 Power Elixirs#k.

Complete a map by collecting #e6 pieces of the pirate's Treasure Map#n once a day to record your progress in the Treasure Map Book.\rWhen you complete a #rTreasure Map over 7 days#k, you can obtain a #bLegendary Glided Giant#k, a special Lv. 100 weapon for Cannoneers that has ATT +107 Magic DEF +62.
You've completed 7 days of Treasure Maps, but the adventure is only just beginning!
Recover one Monkey Doll a day to record your progress in the Monkey Doll Recovery Record.\r\nAs a reward for the first day, you can receive #b20 Power Elixirs#k.

Recover one Monkey Doll a day to record your progress in the Monkey Doll Recovery Record.\r\nAs a reward for the 3rd day, you can receive #b30 Power Elixirs#k and a #bScroll for Armor for ATT/M. ATT 15%#k.

Recover one Monkey Doll a day to record your progress in the Monkey Doll Recovery Record.\r\nAs a reward for the 5th day, you can receive #b50 Power Elixirs#k and a #bScroll for Gloves for ATT or M. ATT 60%#k.

Recover one Monkey Doll a day to record your progress in the Monkey Doll Recovery Record.\rAs a reward for the 7th day, you can receive #r3 permanent #bSpecial Potential Scrolls#k and a #bBling Bling Monkey#k that can be transferred within your account, and used by Cannoneers to decorate their monkey.
You've completed all 7 days! Recover a Monkey Doll every 10 minutes to receive #bMighty Bananas#k and #bMimir's Well Water for Cannoneers#k.

During the event, hunt normal monsters and gather 50 Red Strawberries to take to Gaga. Once you make Strawberry Juice 3 times with Gaga, you'll receive #bEXP#k, as well as a chance to go for the #rMelon Juice Master#k title!

During the event, hunt normal monsters and gather 50 Cool Melons to take to Gaga. Once you make Melon Juice 5 times with Gaga, you'll receive #bEXP#k, as well as a chance to go for the #rKiwi Juice Master#k title!

During the event, hunt normal monsters and gather 50 Ripe Kiwis to take to Gaga. Once you make Kiwi Juice 7 times with Gaga, you'll receive #bEXP#k, as well as a chance to go for the #rPineapple Juice Master#k title!

During the event, hunt normal monsters to gather 50 Fresh Pineapples to take to Gaga. Make Pineapple Juice with Gaga 10 times to receive a #rPink Beach Parasol Chair#k and #rTangy Earrings#k that have stat boosts of #bAllstat+1 and ATT/M.ATT +50#k.
Collect #b50 x #i03994363##t03994363##k from normal monsters to make Strawberry Juice from, and bring them to Gaga.
Collect #b50 #i03994364##t03994364#s#k from normal monsters to make Melon Juice, and bring them to Gaga.
Collect #b50 #i03994365##t03994365#s#k from normal monsters to make Kiwi Juice, and bring them to Gaga.
Collect #b50 #i03994366##t03994366#s#k from normal monsters to make Pineapple Juice, and bring them to Gaga.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 3 reward#k, you'll get #e#b50 Power Elixirs#k#n, which completely restore your HP and MP.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 4 reward#k, you'll get #e#b2 Legends Coins#k#n, which can be spent in the Legends Shop.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 5 reward#k, you'll get a #e#bScroll for Eye Accessory 60% for a stat#k#n, which increases a stat on an eye accessory by 2.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 6 reward#k, you'll get #e#b3 Legends Coins#k#n, which can be spent in the Legends Shop.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 7 reward#k, you'll get a #e#bScroll for Accessory for ATT/M. ATT 15%#k#n, which adds the ATT/M. ATT +1 stat to an accessory item.=

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 8 reward#k, you'll get #e#b5 Legends Coins#k#n, which can be spent in the Legends Shop.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 9 reward#k, you'll get a#e#bGolden Hammer#k#n, which increases the number of upgrades available on an equipment item by 1.

Charge up Cosmic Green and use the #eGoing Green skill once#n each day to stamp your Strategy Journal for that day.\r\n#rFor your Day 10 reward#k, you'll get a pair of #b#eElven Glasses#n#k, which require Lv. 10 and has the following stats: #eATT/M. ATT +2, STR/DEX/INT/LUK +2, weapon DEF/Magic DEF +20, HP/MP +20, Accuracy/Avoidability +30, Charm +100#n.
You've completed all missions as an Eco Mapleteer! Continue to keep Maple World green and safe place with the power of Going Green!
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 20 Power Elixir as a reward for day 1.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 3 Virtue's Blessing as a reward for day 2.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 3 Legendary Mimir's Well Water as a reward for day 3.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 3 1.5X EXP Coupon as a reward for day 4.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 1 Advanced Equip Enhancement Scroll as a reward for day 5.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain 1 Potential Scroll as a reward for day 6.
You can leave a record in the Memory Journal after completing each day's Legendary Memories quest. You can obtain Legends Sweet and Tangy Earrings as a reward for day 7.
You will get a Memory Box for each day you complete starting on the 8th day. Inside, you'll find great special items!
You have conquered the Legendary Memories missions! Your memories will live on forever!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 1 reward#k, you'll get #e#b20 Power Elixirs#k#n, which completely restore your HP and MP!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 2 reward#k, you'll get #e#b3 Food Keeps You Warm buff coupons#k#n, which grant temporary boosts to your ATT, M. ATT, HP, MP, and Movement Speed!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 3 reward#k, you'll get a #e#bBling Bling Monkey#k#n and #e#b3 Legendary Mimir's Well Waters#k#n, which grant a certain percentage of EXP, regardless of your class and level!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 4 reward#k, you'll get #e#b3 1.5X EXP Coupons#k#n, which increases the amount of EXP you obtain by 1.5 for 1 hour!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 5 reward#k, you'll get an #e#bEquip Advanced Enhancement Scroll#k#n, which enhances a fully upgraded item!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 6 reward#k, you'll get a #e#bGolden Hammer#k#n, which increases the number of available upgrades on an equipment item by 1!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day. \r\n#rFor your Day 7 reward#k, you'll get a pair of #e#bLegends Tangy Earrings#k#n (Lv. 75, Upgrades Available: 5, All Stats +3, DEF/M. DEF +50, Hidden Potential item) along with an awesome title!

Complete each day's Making Memories quest to stamp your Summer Memory Journal for that day.  \r\n#rAfter you've completed the quest for 7 days#k, you'll get a #e#bSummer Memory Box#k#n, which contains random special items, once per day starting on Day 8.
You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive one nifty #bTitle#k as a #bDay 1 reward#k.
You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive #b20 Power Elixirs#k which restores your HP and MP as a #bDay 2 reward#k.

You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive #b1 Scroll for Accessory for Stat 60%#k, which has a 60% chance to add +2 stat options to your accessory, as a #bDay 3 reward#k.

You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive #b1 Scroll for Accessory for ATT/Magic ATT 15%#k, which has a 15% chance to add +1 ATT/Magic ATT option to your accessory, as a #bDay 4 reward#k.

You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive #b2 Scrolls for Accessory for ATT/Magic ATT 15%#k, which have a 15% chance to add +1 ATT/Magic ATT option to your accessory, as a #bDay 5 reward#k.

You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive #b1 Chaos Scroll 60%#k which alters you equipment for better or worse as a #bDay 6 reward#k.

You can check your attendance by completeing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive a face decoration item, #bSweet First Love#k, which comes with a Level 70 restriction, 3 available upgrades, +3 to all stats, and +50 Weapon/Magic DEF options, as a #bDay 7 reward#k.
You can check your attendance by completing the #rRemembering First Loves#k quest once a day.\r\nYou will receive a #bPink Bean Chair#k, the comfiest chair in the whole world, as a #bDay 8 reward#k.
You tried your best to help Cassandra find her first love, but there's still more to do! Don't leave her hanging now.

You made your day 7 entry in the Mini Christmas Tree Cultivation Journal \nand obtained an Advanced Equip Enhancement Scroll.

You will get a request every 5th and 35th minute of the hour to #rgo on a rescue mission to save the Native Boys from fearsome beasts#k.\r\n#bParticipate in the rescue 1 time#k and you'll get #b30 Power Elixirs#k!

You will get a request every 5th and 35th minute of the hour to #rgo on a rescue mission to save the Native Boys from fearsome beasts#k.\r\n#bParticipate in the rescue 5 times#k and you'll get the #bTribal Warcry buff#k and #ba noble title#k.

You will get a request every 5th and 35th minute of the hour to #rgo on a rescue mission to save the Native Boys from fearsome beasts#k.\r\n#bParticipate in the rescue 15 times#k and you'll get a #bNative Hog 30-Day Coupon#k and #ba powerful title#k.

You will get a request every 5th and 35th minute of the hour to #rgo on a rescue mission to save the Native Boys from fearsome beasts#k.\r\n#bParticipate in the rescue 20 times#k and you'll get a #bMiraculous Chaos Scroll 60%#k.

You will get a request every 5th and 35th minute of the hour to #rgo on a rescue mission to save the Native Boys from fearsome beasts#k.\r\n#bParticipate in the rescue 25 times#k and you'll get a #bNative Boy Belt#k and #ban awesome title#k.
You went to rescue the Native Boys 25 times! There may be a few boys still trapped out there, so don't be afraid to let your inner hero out!
You can check your attendance once a day by beating Gaga's challenge. Check your attendance x days in a row to get a Rock-Paper-Scissors Trophy!
